input.idea: willbuy.dev — synthetic visitor panel for conversion pages (pricing, landing, checkout). Paste URL(s), pick or author an ICP, get N independent fresh-context LLM 'visitors' returning structured will-to-buy / questions / blockers / next_action. Paired A/B (same backstory, both variants, independent fresh context) is the technical wedge. Self-serve, Stripe-billed, self-hosted Supabase backend, Cloudflare DNS/SSL. v0.1 = 2-minute URL→report loop.
